page_metadata.biotools__summary: IT is an R package to find enriched regions in trancription factor ChIP-seq data. The algorithm uses model-free statistics to identify peak-like distributions of TF ChIP sequencing reads, taking advantage of an improved peak definition in combination with known profile characteristics.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: IT is an R package to find enriched regions in trancription factor ChIP-seq data. The algorithm uses model-free statistics to identify peak-like distributions of TF ChIP sequencing reads, taking advantage of an improved peak definition in combination with known profile characteristics.
